title: eriostemon buxifolius subsp. obovatus
intro: Eriostemon buxifolius subsp. obovatus, also known as the yellowbird bush, is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Eriostemon buxifolius subsp. obovatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
